div1.entryFree:
Single, vb. 1) to isolate, to separate: we will be --d from the barbarous, LLL V, 1, 85 (Q1 singuled). s. you thither then this dainty doe, Tit. II, 1, 117 (bring her thither unattended).*
2) to select from among a number: we s. you as our solicitor, LLL II, 28. I have --d thee alone, H6C II, 4, 1. With forth: H6C II, 1, 12. Tit. II, 3, 69. with out: Ven. 693. H6C II, 4, 12.
